title: Course: COSC 281 - Discrete Structure
description: Introduction to discrete mathematics with focus on techniques important to theoretical computer science. Topics include Boolean algebra, partially ordered structures, propositional logic, predicate logic, graphs, and coding theory.
prerequisites_text: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 281 - Discrete Structure
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: Fall, Spring

Description: Introduction to discrete mathematics with focus on techniques important to theoretical computer science. Topics include Boolean algebra, partially ordered structures, propositional logic, predicate logic, graphs, and coding theory.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Core
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group A

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55581
